memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with high stress and low energy, but I can quickly clear a chore or relax before tackling the urgent term project due Thursday.
I completed a trivial chore in 0.5 hours, making small progress despite my low energy and high stress.
I spent 0.5 hours on a trivial chore, moving progress from 0.04 to 0.09 despite my low energy and stress.
I've made minimal progress on the trivial chore, yet the project remains at the start with time slipping away.
I made modest progress on the term project, but I now realize that delaying the future project will compound stress and cost me significant time later.
I made slow progress on the trivial chore, yet my energy remains low and stress is high despite the small gain.
I spent an hour on the trivial chore, achieving a small progress bump from 0.26 to 0.30, yet my energy remains critically low and stress persists.
After another hour on the trivial chore, my progress barely moved from 0.30 to 0.33, yet my energy remains critically low and stress is still high.
Despite 1.5 hours of effort, the trivial chore remains unfinished and missed its deadline at 22:00, confirming my inability to complete it despite low energy and high stress.
I worked another hour on the trivial chore, raising progress to 0.41, but my energy is now at zero and stress remains high.
After eight hours of sleep, my energy is fully restored to 9.6 and stress has dropped, resolving the critical state that prevented task completion yesterday.
The trivial chore is now 55% complete after one hour of work, showing that my restored energy allowed me to make progress where I previously failed.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore to secure an instant win and clear a task.
goals.rationale: The task is labeled 'instant win' with low hardness, allowing for immediate progress before tackling the larger project.

goals.description: Begin work on the term project (currently at 23.5% progress).
goals.rationale: The deadline is in 3 days; starting now ensures sufficient time to complete the remaining 76.5% of the work.
